item.title: First reading, referred to Appropriations.
item.description: First reading, referred to Appropriations.

item.title: 👍Captain Deion Glover - Washington State Patrol
item.description: Captain Deion Glover signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Patrol.

item.title: 👎Michael McKinley - Washington State Patrol
item.description: Michael McKinley signed up to testify Con.

item.title: APP - Executive action taken by committee.
item.description: APP - Executive action taken by committee.

item.title: APP - Majority; do pass.
item.description: APP - Majority; do pass.

item.title: Minority; do not pass.
item.description: Minority; do not pass.

item.title: Referred to Rules 2 Review.
item.description: Referred to Rules 2 Review.

item.title: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 53; nays, 36; absent, 0; excused, 9.

item.description: Kimberly Mathis signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Patrol.

item.description: Caleb Lötze signed up to testify Con.

item.title: Minority; do not pass.

item.title: WM - Majority; do pass.
item.description: WM - Majority; do pass.

item.title: WATCH: Cost for WA firearm background check fee could shoot up under bill | Washington | thecentersquare.com
